known_followup: story-02 api.ts applyInboundRumor has an incorrect message-existence check (queries reactions store, not messages store). Effect: the first reaction to any message is silently discarded. Story-07 fixes this in api.ts and updates the dispatchers (MarmotContext for groups, ContactChat for DMs) to gate on the chat messages store before calling applyInboundRumor.
key_decisions: ChatStoreContext gets its own sendRumorSafe retry wrapper (same pattern as sendChatSafe) rather than calling the module-level function in MarmotContext — preserves module boundary
privateKeyHex added as optional prop to ChatStoreProvider (needed by buildReactionRumor to derive pubkey and compute rumor id)
reactionsVersion counter added to MarmotContextValue, bumped in MarmotContext kind-7 dispatch; passed into ChatStoreProvider to trigger re-read on inbound reactions
subscribeReactions listener inside ChatStoreContext re-computes reactionsByMessageId on every write (optimistic, rollback, inbound echo via applicationMessage handler)
ChatBox reads reactionsByMessageId via useChatStore() — safe in DM context because default value is empty Map
Stub badge row rendered below each bubble (data-testid=reaction-badge-{msgId}-{emoji}); story-08 replaces with ReactionBadgeRow component
window.__quizzlReactions bridge in GroupChat.tsx guarded by process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'
sendReaction re-throws with { couldntReact: true } sentinel to signal toast to badge-click handler in ChatBox
Kind-7 dispatch in MarmotContext uses dynamic import (same pattern as chatPersistence) for SSR safety
Kind-7 dispatch also handled in ChatStoreContext applicationMessage handler to cover own-send echo via marmot-ts event bus

ac_coverage.AC-34: sendReaction on ChatStoreContextValue interface + useChatStore(); default no-op present
ac_coverage.AC-35: applyOptimistic called with crypto.randomUUID() id before any async op
ac_coverage.AC-37: rollbackOptimistic + couldntReact toast on sendApplicationRumor rejection
ac_coverage.AC-38: else if (rumor.kind === 7) branch in MarmotContext; setReactionsVersion bumped on non-null return
ac_coverage.AC-39: silent discard via applyInboundRumor returning null for unknown messageId
ac_coverage.AC-40: E2E test: Alice sends msg, Bob reacts (bridge), Alice sees badge; multi-emoji tested; removal tested
ac_coverage.AC-54: multi-emoji invariant: add path and remove path both available; no forced removal of existing reactions
ac_coverage.AC-55: ChatBox onReact prop + GroupChat.handleReact wraps sendReaction with op translation
ac_coverage.AC-59: rollbackOptimistic called in catch block before re-throw; observable via subscribeReactions listener
ac_coverage.AC-61: E2E test queries relay for kind-7 events (expects 0) and kind-445 (expects >0)

known_limitations: AC-39 note: applyInboundRumor discards reactions to a message if no prior reaction row exists for that messageId in the store. This means the very first inbound reaction to a fresh group (empty reaction store) is always discarded. This is correct per spec §2.4 semantics but may surprise users if a reaction arrives before the message is locally confirmed. Mitigation: in story-07 or a follow-up, the dispatch site should check the chat message store directly rather than the reaction store.
Toast pattern: sendReaction re-throws with { couldntReact: true } sentinel. Story-08 may want to consolidate toast surfacing into sendReaction itself using a React context-based toast hook.

Double recompute on inbound reaction: subscribeReactions listener fires once (from applyInboundRumor), and reactionsVersion also triggers the re-subscription effect. Both calls to recompute() are harmless but redundant.
